title: TREX Network launches dedicated ledger on Polygon for tokenized assets
message_html: TREX Network launches dedicated ledger on Polygon for tokenized assets ...
snippet: CoinDesk (@CoinDesk): NEW: @TREX_Network launches dedicated ledger on @0xPolygon for tokenized assets. The ERC-3643 standard embeds compliance rules directly into tokens, creating a shared compliance reference layer across blockchains.
